design_philosophy.core_concept: Visualizing the invisible flows of corporate strategy. The interface should feel like a specialized tool for financial forensics.
design_philosophy.surface_strategy: Grid Borders & Tactical Minimalism. Use thin borders and glow effects to define hierarchy.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Syne' for all section titles and major metrics. Font weights 600 or 700. Tracking tight.
usage_rules.body: Use 'DM Sans' for general text, descriptions, and labels. High legibility.
usage_rules.data: Use 'DM Mono' for ALL financial numbers, confidence scores, dates, and code snippets. This is non-negotiable for the 'research' feel.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode B: High Density). Every pixel must be utilized.
layout.spacing: Compact for data density, but grouped logically. Use 'gap-4' for dashboard grids.
layout.container_style: Card-less look or flat cards with 1px borders. No heavy drop shadows. Use 'border border-gray-800' to define areas.

Button.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded-md. Primary buttons should use the Cyan accent with black text for high contrast.

Badge.style: Use 'DM Mono'. Pill shape. Outline variant preferred for neutral states.

Charts.style: Dark mode optimized. Grid lines should be color '#374151' (gray-700) with 0.2 opacity. Text color '#9ca3af'.

Navigation.style: Sidebar or Topbar with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80). Active state: Cyan text + subtle glow.

visual_enhancers.Glow Effects: Use 'shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,212,255,0.3)]' for active elements or high-distress predictions.
visual_enhancers.Gradients: Avoid full background gradients. Use subtle linear gradients for progress bars or chart fills (Cyan to transparent).
visual_enhancers.Borders: Use 'border-t-2 border-primary' on top of key metric cards to signify importance.

hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy dark overlay (opacity 80-90%) to ensure text readability.

about_section.usage: Visual anchor for the 'About' or 'Methodology' section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-primary (#f9fafb) is used on the dark background (#0a0e1a). Avoid using dark gray text on the dark background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible cyan ring offset-2 for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install chart.js react-chartjs-2 framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge' immediately.
FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'src/index.css' at the very top.
TAILWIND: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the provided colors and font families.
CHARTS: Use 'react-chartjs-2' for all visualizations. Configure the 'defaults' in a centralized file to set global font (DM Mono) and colors.
LAYOUT: Create a responsive layout. Sidebar on desktop, collapsible drawer on mobile.
TEST_IDS: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, chart containers).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not center align the app container.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 'DM Mono' for all numerical data.
Ensure the 'Distress Prediction' is the most prominent element on the Predict page.
